name: Breakfast Portobellos with Shiitakes
recipeIngredient: 4 medium-to-large fresh portobello caps, 4-6 inches across, cleaned
4 oz shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and caps sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place portobello caps, gill side up, in a large baking dish and bake for 5 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a large sauté pan over high heat. Add shiitakes, onion, and corn; sauté until mushrooms are limp and corn is tender, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add pine nuts and bacon (if using) and stir well. Season with salt.
5. Remove mushrooms from the oven and evenly divide the shiitake mixture among the 4 caps, smoothing the surface so the caps lay as flat as possible to prevent eggs from sliding to one side while baking.
6. Crack 2 eggs on top of each mushroom.
7. Lightly season the eggs with salt and return the dish to the oven.
8. Bake until the eggs are cooked to your liking, then serve immediately.
